name: WWT Llanelli Wetland Centre
highlights: Flamingos, flocks of waders and a Millennium Coastal Path skyline above Carmarthen Bay.
points_of_interest: Wildfowl & Wetlands Trust collection; flamingo flock; Peter Scott observatory
viewpoints: Panoramic window over Burry Inlet; Gower horizon
parking_start: WWT Llanelli car park (entry fee; free for WWT members)
food_drink_nearby: Water's Edge Café; Sosban Restaurant Llanelli
